files.name: styles.css
files.content: body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; } header { background-color: #f0f0f0; padding: 20px; } nav ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } nav li { display: inline-block; margin-right: 20px; } nav a { text-decoration: none; color: #337ab7; } main { display: block; padding: 20px; } footer { background-color: #f0f0f0; padding: 10px; text-align: center; }
